## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the operational error is.

## Execution Track (Check One)
- [ ] Track A: Native Local Host Loop (`uv` + `npm run dev`)
- [ ] Track B: Containerized Isolation (`docker compose up`)

## Steps To Reproduce
1. Go to workspace component panel '...'
2. Click on interactive button element '...'
3. Enter prompt string payload '...'
4. See structural error signature

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen according to the system specification guidelines.

## Environment Context
- OS Environment: [e.g., Ubuntu 24.04 LTS, WSL2, macOS]
- Browser Client: [e.g., Chrome, Brave, Safari]
- Local Host Port Conflict: (Yes/No)

## Error Logs / Console Screenshots
Paste your terminal output trace logs or browser inspection console errors here.
